title: oxalis loricata
intro: Oxalis loricata, also known as the wooden sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and kidney problems due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oxalis loricata include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve kidney function, and provide antioxidant effects. The herbal preparations of Oxalis loricata include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
